titleStmt.title: SII 9.74: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 74. (A.R. No. 710 of 1919.) ON A SLAB LYING NEAR THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT KANCHAGARA-BELAGALLU, ALUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 903, Vikrama, Vaiśākha, śu. 5, Bṛihaspativāra corresponding to A.D. 981, April 22 Thursday and refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Āhavamalladēva, who is said here to have confirmed the old sthāna-mānya to the three Śiva temples of Kañchagāra-Beḷgali. Rēvaladēvī, the queen of Vīra-Noḷamba-Pallava-Permānaḍidēva, who bore the title ‘Lord of Kāñchī,’ is also said to have granted 6 mattars of land to the god Kāḷapṛi(ri)yadēva and the two (temples of) Vishṇudēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja
paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakan satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmadāhavamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhividdhipravarddhamāna
mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire sakavarṣa 903 neya vikramasaṁvatsarada
vaiśākha suddha 5 brihaspativāraṁ Agrahāraṁ kañcagārabeḷgaliya
pūrvvada sthānamānyaṁ mūṟuṁ śivālayakke naḍeva piriyakōla kariya
matta 18 paṁcikēśvarakke matta 6 bhaḷārige matta 6 bhaṭṭageyi matta 6 caṭṭa
geyi matta 6 perggaḍegeyi matta 8 Aṁbigageyi matta 8 taḷāṟageyi ma
tta 12 Aṁtinitumaṁ svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷippar . sāmānyōyaṁ dharma
sētu(ṁ)rnripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālinīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētāṁ bhāginaḥ
pārtthivēṁdrō bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . svadattaṁ para
dattaṅvā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāya
tē krimiḥ . svasti samadhigatapañcamahāśabda pallavānvayaṁ śrīprithvīva
llabha pallavakuḷatiḷakanēkavākyaṁ kāṁcīpuravarēśvaraṁ śrīmanvīrano
ḷambapallava permmānaḍidēvara mahādēvi śrīmadu rēvaladēviyarkkā
ḷapṛyadēvargge biṭṭa matta 6 Eraḍuṁ viṣṇudēvargge biṭṭa matta 12 .
Digital edition of SII 9.74 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
